title: Add Stripe webhook handlers
body:
## Summary

Wires up the Stripe webhook flow:

- `payment_intent.succeeded` updates the order status
- `charge.refunded` triggers the refund email pipeline
- All handlers idempotent on `event.id`

## Test plan

- [x] Unit tests for each event type
- [x] Replay-attack test with duplicate event IDs
- [ ] Run the Stripe CLI fixtures against staging
